title: Wednesday weather: Light rain and cloudy but clearing
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - According to the...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - According to the South African Weather Service, two cold fronts are approaching the southern parts of South Africa.

Wednesday looks to be fine over the central parts, otherwise partly cloudy and cold to cool with isolated showers and rain in the east and south.


> The following weather warning was issued:


Yellow level 1 warning:Damaging winds resulting in localised disruption of small harbours and/or a port for a short period of time, small vessels at risk of taking on water and capsizing in a locality, and difficulty in navigation are expected between Port Edward and Kosi Bay.


> Here are your weather details for Wednesday 4 June:


Western CapeFine in the extreme west, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to cold with isolated morning light showers and rain along the south coast where it will be cloudy. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh easterly to south-south-easterly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeCloudy with isolated morning showers along the coast and adjacent interior, otherwise partly cloudy and cold. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly, becoming light easterly from evening.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog in places in the north, otherwise partly cloudy and cold to very cold, but cool along the coast. Isolated light showers are expected in the south-west. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
